mapper.select:
select rule_id as ruleId, rebate_mode as rebateMode, rebate_value as rebateValue, service_fee_mode as serviceFeeMode, service_fee_value as serviceFeeValue from jst_rebate_rule where contest_id = #{contestId} and status = 1 and del_flag = '0' and effective_time <= #{now} and (expire_time is null or expire_time >= #{now})
and (channel_id = #{channelId} or channel_id is null) order by case when channel_id = #{channelId} then 0 else 1 end, rule_id desc
and channel_id is null order by rule_id desc
limit 1
